calendar.matters:
Petition To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Edward Thirkell appearing for petitioner George McCormick. Michael Freedman appearing for petitioner Thomas Curran. Tentative Ruling on Motion to Change Venue is Motion is granted. The 1995 Trust is a valid trust naming George McCormick as the trustee. The proper venue is Alameda County. Mr. Freedman argued that his petition to transfer action is set for hearing on 7/3. He has filed a petition in Alameda County to transfer the action here. Mr. Thirkell is concerned that the trust assets were not turn over to Mr. McCormick as trustee. Mr. Freedman argued that Mr. McCormick is not the trustee of the Survivors Trust. The issue on trust assets is not before the court today. Requests for sanctions are denied. Tentative ruling will stand. The Trust will take place in Alameda County. The hearing set on 7/3 is off calendar. That petition is moot.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR# 5208. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: M. Loos.

Successor Trustee Petition For Instructions Under Probate Code Section 17200 1. To Determine Validit
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Text Ruling

Successor Trustee Petition For Instructions Under Probate Code Section 17200 1. To Determine Validit
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Michael Freedman appearing for petitioner Thomas Curran. Edward Thirkell appearing for George McCormick. Counsel agreed to continue the petition to 6/4. The same date as the Motion for change of venue. Issues discussed. Mr. Freedman stated his client does not have any of the stock certificates. Mr. Thirkell will take the steps to have them re-issued. Matter is continued to 6/4.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
